elevator_pitch: PYLearn is an AI chatbot platform that teaches Python while you build your own apps.
problem_and_solution: The real-world problem is learning a new programming language without guidance. PYLearn solves it by providing an interactive UI showcase, privacy-first AI, and zero-cloud dependency.
name: PYLearn

elevator_pitch: Automate Pinterest pin creation with batch production of compelling titles, descriptions, and visual content for food blogs.
problem_and_solution: Food bloggers struggle to create visually appealing pins without manual effort. This project solves it by automating the process using Streamlit's interactive dashboard and Ollama's AI copy engine.
name: Pinterest-Factory

elevator_pitch: NarratiQ is an AI-powered market analysis platform that generates contextual narratives from price action, news sentiment, and social buzz.
problem_and_solution: The project solves the problem of understanding why financial events occur by providing a unified memory for specialized AI agents to generate insights. It achieves this through multi-source synthesis, persistent memory, and continuous operation.
name: narratiq

elevator_pitch: Project Kernel is an open-source ECE market intelligence system that uses Python and Streamlit to analyze preschool competitors in Malaysia.
problem_and_solution: The project solves the problem of discovering and analyzing preschool competitors within a 10km radius of Bukit Jelutong by providing a comprehensive Early Childhood Education (ECE) market intelligence system. It enriches and analyzes data from various sources, including Overpass API, Kiddy123 Directory, Foursquare Places API, DuckDuckGo Search, and Nominatim reverse geocoding.
name: project_kernel

elevator_pitch: Aurora is a next-generation sustainable wealth management app that simplifies investing by combining traditional portfolio management with ESG analytics.
problem_and_solution: The real-world problem is greenwashing and fragmented portfolios, while Aurora solves it by providing a unified dashboard and ESG transparency engine.
name: wealth-compass
